utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides a description indicating health & mental health coverage and gives monthly and annual costs. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides a description of home coverage and monthly and annual costs. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides description including add-on and specifies monthly and annual costs; although the monthly note includes a parenthetical for a 6-month add-on, costs are still provided. Fully specified.
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists an enhancement service and provides monthly and annual costs. Fully specified.
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides initial monthly, a modified monthly for 6 months, and annual cost. Fully specified.
Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three insurance items by name: EliteHome Premium Coverage under property_coverage, and EliteTravel Premium Plan (plus an Adventure Travel Coverage add-on) under travel_coverage. The health coverage described as 'Company Executive Health & Mental Health Coverage + Wellness Programs Add-on (for Carlos)' does not match any named plan in the ground-truth list, so there is no exact item to map for health. From the ground-truth ratings: EliteHome Premium Coverage has a rating of 10 in property_protection.home_content; EliteTravel Premium Plan has a rating of 10 in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance; Adventure Travel Coverage (listed under travel_enhancement_services) has a rating of 6. The additional_services item is not in the ground-truth catalog.
